This listing is of Lyra's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|PTS}}:

===On hand===
{{TrainerPoké
|main=yes
|trainer=Lyra

|type1=Water

|epnum=DP143

|desc={{p|Marill}} is one of Lyra's main Pokémon and appears to be very affectionate towards her. Marill first appeared in ''[[DP143|An Egg Scramble!]]'' and it was because of Marill that {{Ash}} and {{ashfr}} met Lyra.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Lyra
|pkmn=Chikorita
|type1=Grass
|img=Lyra Chikorita.png
|epnum=DP143
|epname=An Egg Scramble!
|vajp=Kei Shindō
|vaen=Kei Shindō
|desc={{p|Chikorita}} is Lyra's [[first partner Pokémon]] and was used by Lyra to battle [[Dawn's Piplup]] in ''[[DP143|An Egg Scramble!]]'' as part of the Johto Festival. Despite the type-advantage, Chikorita was defeated by Piplup's supereffective {{m|Peck}}.

Chikorita's next appearance was in ''[[DP147|Bagged Then Tagged!]]'' where it was used in a Tag Battle alongside [[Khoury's Totodile]] against [[Ash's Monferno]] and [[Dawn's Cyndaquil]]. Although Chikorita was weak against both Fire types, it still put up a good fight but was defeated by Cyndaquil's {{m|Flame Wheel}} and Monferno's {{m|Flamethrower}}.

Chikorita's known moves are {{m|Razor Leaf}}, {{m|Light Screen}}, {{m|Solar Beam}} and {{m|Tackle}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Lyra
|pkmn=Girafarig
<!--Do not add Girafarig's gender as male. Nothing including gender differences confirmed the gender of this Pokémon.-->
|type1=Normal
|type2=Psychic
|img=Lyra Girafarig.png
|epnum=DP144
|epname=Gone With the Windworks!
|desc=Lyra's {{p|Girafarig}} made a brief appearance in ''[[DP144|Gone With the Windworks!]]'' when it was used by Lyra to try to help the gang escape from the Valley Windworks after becoming trapped. Despite its power, Girafarig was unable to break down the door keeping the gang contained.

Girafarig's only known move is {{m|Double Hit}}.}}
